title: Plutarch, Moralia: Table Talk: Symposium I-IX
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Table Talk: Symposium I-IX.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Table Talk: Symposium I-IX.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Table Talk: Symposium I-IX': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
